releaseVerificationTargets.releaseGateBlocker: Android release gate is blocked until device or emulator smoke, lifecycle, touch/input, audio, resource loading, save data, shutdown, soak and package-content evidence pass.
iOS release gate is blocked until macOS/Xcode simulator or device smoke/soak, signing references without secrets, lifecycle/touch/safe-area evidence and package-content evidence pass.
Linux release gate is blocked until reference project launch, rendering, input, audio, resources, scene switching, save data, pause/resume, shutdown, 30-minute soak and package-content evidence pass.

macOS release gate is blocked until reference project launch, rendering, input, audio, resources, scene switching, save data, pause/resume, shutdown, 30-minute soak and package-content evidence pass on macOS arm64.

WebAssembly browser release gate is blocked until browser package smoke, rendering readiness, pointer/touch/keyboard input, audio unlock policy, resource loading, sandbox save-data policy, browser launch evidence and soak-equivalent criteria pass.

Windows release gate is blocked until reference project launch, rendering, input, audio, resources, scene switching, save data, pause/resume, shutdown, 30-minute soak and package-content evidence pass.

releaseVerificationDecision.summary: 0.1.0 Preview keeps all six runtime targets in releaseVerificationTargets; blocked-environment artifacts document missing prerequisites but do not pass the release gate.
